title: Sliding Item
description: A component that provides a swipeable item with revealable action buttons, commonly used in lists to show additional actions. Users can drag an item horizontally to reveal hidden option buttons, enabling quick actions like edit, delete, or share.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-sliding-item with prefix and suffix action buttons

props.name: color
props.description: The color theme for the prefix action button

props.name: text
props.description: The text label to display on the prefix action button

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the prefix action button is clicked

props.name: color
props.description: The color theme for the suffix action button

props.name: text
props.description: The text label to display on the suffix action button

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the suffix action button is clicked
